name: @chbrain/khai-engine-grit
description: khai engine content, the grit domain: grit as position, the persona's resting stamina toward a distant goal -- passion held steady across years, perseverance of effort held through setback and plateau.
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE and LICENSE-CODE

khai.tagline: Grit as position: the persona's resting stamina toward a distant goal -- passion held steady across years and perseverance of effort held through setback and plateau, the marathon rather than the sprint.

card.wire: Attaches at Position. The anchor (position_grit.md) declares grit as a resting stamina toward a distant goal -- a baseline on two facets, consistency of interest and perseverance of effort -- and the system-wide law makes every persona carry it beneath every plan that reaches past a single scene.
card.issue: Two ready expressions a persona may hold, the two facets of the Grit Scale: passion (the same top-level goal held for years, not traded for the next pursuit that shines) and perseverance (effort that keeps landing on the goal through setback, boredom, and plateau). Each is a full position file the build composes onto the anchor, so the persona gets a stamina that colours every distant reach, not a label. More expressions slot in as sibling files without moving the anchor.
card.require: Two altitudes must hold. One, the law: declared once in the project's Instructions Knowledge chapter ('personas carry a grit'), so the stamina holds system-wide and no persona chases a far goal on borrowed resolve alone. Two, the link: each persona carries its grit under Projection. A persona may also hold a different, even contradicting, stamina under Shadow; the gap between the grit shown and the grit masked is the character, not a contradiction to reject.
card.enforce: Structure is checked; coherence is judged. The kit verifies the floor: the law is declared, and each persona carries a grit under Projection. Whether a Projection grit and a Shadow grit cohere into a true persona is semantic, so it is taught and reviewed, never failed by the suite. The engine ships its own structural tests; the reading is guided, not gated.
card.setup: Two steps. Declare the law in the Instructions Knowledge chapter, linking the anchor. Then give each persona its grit under Projection: one expression, which carries the anchor upward. Where a persona masks a different stamina, put it under Shadow. Read it in what the persona is still chasing years after it stopped being new; the room reads it beneath the plans, never narrates it.
